readinessLevels.label: AI Invisible
readinessLevels.description: Fundamentally invisible to AI crawlers. Critical infrastructure failures.

readinessLevels.label: AI Hostile
readinessLevels.description: Severe deficiencies that actively prevent AI citation.

readinessLevels.label: AI Unaware
readinessLevels.description: Built without AI findability in mind. Rarely cited.

readinessLevels.label: AI Emerging
readinessLevels.description: Foundational GEO elements in place but gaps remain.

readinessLevels.label: AI Optimized
readinessLevels.description: Well-optimized for AI findability. Likely appearing in citations.

readinessLevels.label: AI Authority
readinessLevels.description: Best-in-class GEO implementation. Dominates AI citations.
